phrases.intent_en: Where is the bus ticket machine
phrases.text_local: Πού είναι το μηχάνημα των εισιτηρίων;
phrases.cultural_note: Public transport signage in Greece often directs to 'στάση' (stop) or 'λεωφορεία' (buses).

likely_response.local: Στην κεντρική στάση, αριστερά από την είσοδο.
likely_response.translation_en: At the main stop, to the left of the entrance.

responses.english: At the main stop, to the left of the entrance.
responses.french: Στην κεντρική στάση, αριστερά από την είσοδο.

phrases.intent_en: Do tavernas here prefer cash tips
phrases.text_local: Είναι καλύτερα το φιλοδώρημα σε μετρητά;
phrases.cultural_note: Cash tipping ('φιλοδώρημα') is culturally prevalent in Greek tavernas, especially in tourist areas.

phrases.intent_en: Where is Baja beach bar from here
phrases.cultural_note: Beach bars ('μπαράκια') in Greek coastal strips are typically located along the main beachfront path.

likely_response.translation_en: Towards the end of the beach.

responses.english: Towards the end of the beach.

phrases.intent_en: Is the water sports hut open now
phrases.text_local: Είναι ανοιχτή η καλύβα των θαλάσσιων σπορ;
phrases.cultural_note: Hut-based services ('καλύβες') are common for water sports in Greek beaches and typically operate during daylight hours.

phrases.intent_en: How do I rent a sunbed here
phrases.cultural_note: Beach vendors ('Ναυοξέρης') are the standard point of contact for sunbed/umbrella rentals in Greek beach strips.
